saturationValue.description: saturation enhance strength,range 0 to 0.2, suggest 0.1, 0 is no enhance , 0.2 is most enhanced

DarkPoint.description: control DarkPoint(8bit gamma domain) in Lhe,suggest value 50

ShadowPoint.description: control ShadowPoint(8bit gamma domain) in Lhe,suggest value 160

HighLightPoint.description: control HighLightPoint(8bit gamma domain) in Lhe,suggest value 230

SkyEqStrength.description: control Total Lhe Strenth in sky, suggest value 1.0

PortraitEqStrength.description: control Total Lhe Strenth in Portrait, suggest value 1.0

SkinEqStrength.description: control Total Lhe Strenth in Skin, suggest value 0.0

ColorGradeAdjust_dark_strength.description: Degree of cutdark , range from 0 (No adjust) to 1 (Max adjust)

ColorGradeAdjust_white_strength.description: Degree of cutwhitek , range from 0 (No adjust) to 1 (Max adjust)

ColorGradeAdjust_dark_lower_limit.description: [lower_limit,upper_limit] adjust ,otherwise bypass,range from 0 (No adjust) to 16383 (Max adjust),

ColorGradeAdjust_dark_upper_limit.description: [lower_limit,upper_limit] adjust ,otherwise bypass,range from 0 (No adjust) to 16383 (Max adjust)

ColorGradeAdjust_white_lower_limit.description: [lower_limit,upper_limit] adjust ,otherwise bypass,range from 0 (No adjust) to 16383 (Max adjust),

ColorGradeAdjust_white_upper_limit.description: [lower_limit,upper_limit] adjust ,otherwise bypass,range from 0 (No adjust) to 16383 (Max adjust)

ColorGradeAdjust_dark_strength.description: Degree of cutdark , range from 0 (No adjust) to 1 (Max adjust)

ColorGradeAdjust_white_strength.description: Degree of cutwhitek , range from 0 (No adjust) to 1 (Max adjust)

ColorGradeAdjust_dark_lower_limit.description: [lower_limit,upper_limit] adjust ,otherwise bypass,range from 0 (No adjust) to 16383 (Max adjust),

ColorGradeAdjust_dark_upper_limit.description: [lower_limit,upper_limit] adjust ,otherwise bypass,range from 0 (No adjust) to 16383 (Max adjust)

ColorGradeAdjust_white_lower_limit.description: [lower_limit,upper_limit] adjust ,otherwise bypass,range from 0 (No adjust) to 16383 (Max adjust),

ColorGradeAdjust_white_upper_limit.description: [lower_limit,upper_limit] adjust ,otherwise bypass,range from 0 (No adjust) to 16383 (Max adjust)

ColorGradeAdjust_dark_strength.description: Degree of cutdark , range from 0 (No adjust) to 1 (Max adjust)

ColorGradeAdjust_white_strength.description: Degree of cutwhitek , range from 0 (No adjust) to 1 (Max adjust)

ColorGradeAdjust_dark_lower_limit.description: [lower_limit,upper_limit] adjust ,otherwise bypass,range from 0 (No adjust) to 16383 (Max adjust),

ColorGradeAdjust_dark_upper_limit.description: [lower_limit,upper_limit] adjust ,otherwise bypass,range from 0 (No adjust) to 16383 (Max adjust)

ColorGradeAdjust_white_lower_limit.description: [lower_limit,upper_limit] adjust ,otherwise bypass,range from 0 (No adjust) to 16383 (Max adjust),

ColorGradeAdjust_white_upper_limit.description: [lower_limit,upper_limit] adjust ,otherwise bypass,range from 0 (No adjust) to 16383 (Max adjust)

i32defalutGammaTab.description: the gamma table is copy from the most bright part gamma lut in ipe gamma

i32defalutPortraitGammaTab.description: the Portrait gamma table is copy from the most bright part gamma lut in ipe gamma
